question: Which club won both its domestic league title and the Champions League in the 2025-26 season?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
Paris Saint-Germain completed the double in 2025-26: they won the Ligue 1 title (their 14th French championship, and fifth in a row) on 13 May 2026, and then won the UEFA Champions League on 30 May 2026, beating Arsenal in the final at the Puskás Aréna in Budapest (14-13 on the scoreline reported).

Sources:
- https://www.psg.fr/en/content/pr-paris-saint-germain-crowned-as-french-champions-for-fifth-time-in-a-row
- https://www.uefa.com/uefachampionsleague/news/02a5-20901454177c-738c0ac757df-1000--paris-win-champions-league-meet-the-2025-26-victors/
- https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_UEFA_Cha

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
**Paris Saint-Germain (PSG)** won both the **2025–26 Ligue 1 title** and the **2025–26 UEFA Champions League**, defeating Arsenal on penalties in the final.

Sources: [PSG – Ligue 1 title](https://www.psg.fr/en/content/pr-paris-saint-germain-crowned-as-french-champions-for-fifth-time-in-a-row) · [UEFA – Champions League victory](https://www.uefa.com/uefachampionsleague/news/02a5-20901454177c-738c0ac757df-1000--paris-win-champions-league-meet-the-2025-26-victors/)
